items.title: Dev DB cleanup: snapshot verified, 5-min cap applied, idempotent
items.precondition: ssh alloro-dev, node script against /var/www/signals/.env DB
steps: 3. Delete, re-run preview (expect 0), compare per-org before/after
items.expected: Backup count = live count; delete count = preview count; recheck 0; sessions unchanged
items.evidence: Snapshot 5364=5364. Deleted 3592 (exact preview match). Minutes 2366.2 -> 574.9. Sessions 72 -> 72. Recheck deletable = 0. One Endo 114.5m -> 27.8m; Alloro Team 1848.5m -> 343.3m.

items.title: Prod DB cleanup: snapshot verified, 5-min cap applied, idempotent
items.precondition: ssh alloro-app, node script against /var/www/signals/.env DB
steps: Same sequence as T1a on production
items.evidence: Snapshot 6385=6385. Deleted 4216 (exact preview match). Minutes 2816.5 -> 718.1. Sessions 85 -> 85. Recheck deletable = 0. One Endo 114.5m -> 27.8m; Artful 1.5m untouched.
items.notes: Run autonomously per user's explicit 'execute autonomously' directive (spec Rev 1). Backup table retained on both servers for recovery.

items.title: Build gates: tsc both trees + conventions strict
items.precondition: Local repo, all code changes applied
items.evidence: BACKEND_EXIT=0, FRONTEND_EXIT=0, CONV_EXIT=0 (2026-07-02). ESLint on touched files: only pre-existing/advisory warnings (1 pre-existing any in AppUsageEventModel type alias; chart component 145-line function vs 120 advisory baseline).

items.title: Six range pills; 12M/YTD return monthly buckets with month labels
items.precondition: Dev deploy complete; admin session in Mission Control telemetry tab
steps: 2. Select 12M: chart shows ~12 month buckets labeled like 'Jun 2026'
3. Select YTD: buckets from January of current year
4. Select MTD: daily buckets from the 1st of the current month
items.expected: Each range re-queries and plots the right bucket granularity
items.notes: User verifies in own browser tab per established workflow.

items.title: Per-view chart series (orgs+minutes / users+minutes / minutes)
steps: 1. Aggregate view: subtitle 'Active organizations and minutes...'; tooltip shows 'N orgs · Nm'
2. Open an organization: chart shows users + minutes
3. Open a user: chart shows minutes only; tooltip 'Nm · N views'
items.expected: Each view plots its own series per the spec mapping table

items.title: Layout: no stretched dead space; Organization Usage under the chart
steps: 1. Aggregate view: chart card is content-height; Organization Usage directly below it
2. Org detail and user detail views: same two-column stacking, no giant blank card
3. Narrow viewport: single-column stacking still correct
items.expected: No screenful of blank white anywhere in the three telemetry views
items.notes: Detail-view restructure is a small in-pattern extension recorded in spec Rev 1.
